docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMOS, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED ORIGINAL PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIM SUBPOENA RETURNED WITH COPY OF SUBPOENA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED MAY 4, 2021 AT 10:00 A.M. IF NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES, MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDCIE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: REGISTERED AGENT SOLUTIONS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMOS, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DOORDASH, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED. AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR SERVICE: REGISTERED AGENT SOLUTIONS SERVED DEC-03-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-04-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEVIN RAMOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.. REPRESENTED BY ERIN ANDEREGG, LITIGATION MANAGER IS PRESENT BY ZOOM. A HEARING IS NOT HELD. PLAINTIFF STATES AT THE TIME THIS MATTER IS CALLED, THAT A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED PRIOR TODAYS HEARING AND MAKES A REQUEST FOR A PROGRESS REPORT DATE. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ARE MET AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF THE TERMS ARE NOT MET AS AGREED TO, AN APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED, AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED AT THAT TIME. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
